methods.description: Statistical procedures used to analyze the spatio-temporal differences in pollinators' activities, stigmatic pollen load, fruit set, seed production, and floral traits among different populations and flowering stages.

steps.description: Covariance analysis was used to compare the visiting frequencies among plants from the different flowering stages and the three studied populations, with main effect and interaction, and the flowering density as the covariant.
steps.searchable_summary: perform covariance analysis on visiting frequencies

steps.description: A two-way ANOVA was used to detect the spatio-temporal variations in the stigmatic pollen load, fruit set, seed production, and/or each test floral trait among the plants from the different populations and flowering stages, with main effect and interaction.
steps.searchable_summary: perform two-way ANOVA on stigmatic pollen load and other traits

steps.description: Multi-ANOVA was conducted to detect the effects of pollination treatment, flowering stage, and population on the seed production per capsule.
steps.searchable_summary: perform multi-ANOVA on seed production per capsule

steps.description: The independent T-test was used to detect whether adding extra pollen increased seed production per capsule.
steps.searchable_summary: perform independent T-test on seed production with extra pollen

steps.description: Data processing and variance analyses were conducted by Excel 2010 and SPSS 21.0.
steps.searchable_summary: process data and conduct variance analysis using Excel and SPSS

steps.description: Tested all the data by normal distribution or conducted data conversion before analysis of variance.
steps.searchable_summary: test data for normal distribution or convert data

methods.description: Procedure to measure various floral traits to explore flower divergence at different flowering stages from three studied populations.

steps.description: Randomly selected more than 30 flowers/inflorescences from different individual plants to measure floral traits.
steps.searchable_summary: select flowers for measuring floral traits

steps.description: Measured floral longevity, floral display size, inflorescence size, corolla-tube length, stigma-anther distance, numbers of ovules, and pollen grains per flower.
steps.searchable_summary: measure floral traits including longevity, display size, and others

steps.description: Fixed flowers into formalin-aceto-alcohol solution for counting pollen grains and ovules later in the laboratory.
steps.searchable_summary: preserve flowers in FAA solution for lab analysis

methods.description: Description of the study species and selection of study sites for conducting investigations on Pedicularis rhinanthoides.

steps.description: Conducted pilot study in 2013 to determine the experiment sites.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct pilot study to select experiment sites

steps.description: Selected three populations distant from each other in wet shrubs or meadow edges.
steps.searchable_summary: select three distinct populations for study

steps.description: Divided the flowering of a population into three stages according to Dafni.
steps.searchable_summary: divide flowering into stages based on Dafni's method

steps.description: Conducted field investigations at three flowering stages for each population.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct field investigations at different flowering stages
